locations.name: 比奥科岛
locations.summary: 比奥科岛（Bioko），原名“费尔南多波岛”（西班牙語：Fernando Poo），是非洲西海岸几内亚湾中的一个火山岛，属赤道几内亚管辖，该国前首都马拉博即位于岛上。该岛面积为2,017平方公里，人口33万人。該島嶼原為西班牙殖民地，因其…

relations.subject: Blue-throated roller

relations.evidence: It is native to the African tropical rainforest

relations.subject: Blue-throated roller
relations.evidence: The blue-throated roller occurs in western sub-Saharan Africa from Guinea to Cameroon, south to northern Angola, and west to south-eastern Uganda. It is also found on Bioko Island. The blue-throated roller tends to remain high up in the tops of trees and hunts above the canopy of primary and secondary rainforest, plantations, gallery forests and relict forest patches in cleared regions
